meta.name: ReSet Call Points
meta.description: Resettable call points for fire alarm systems
meta.heroTitle: Resettable Manual Call Point with Break-Glass Simulation
meta.heroDescription:
Manual call point with resettable operating element that simulates break-glass activation without replacement parts. Visible activation indicator with key reset for immediate re-use.
Available in six colours with dual, flush or surface mounting and four electrical configurations including conventional fire and Sav-wire models.
Designed for fire alarm systems in commercial and public buildings requiring rapid service restoration.

options.01: #01 Conventional Fire Model with 470/680Ω Resistor, Series 01
options.05: #05 Sav-wire (2-wire) with 470/680Ω Resistor and Diode, Series 05
